name: chess-mcp-monorepo
description: Chess repertoire UI + Node MCP server (TypeScript).

scripts.check:tool-contract: pnpm --filter @chess-mcp/chess-tools build && node --import tsx scripts/tool-contract-inventory.mjs && node scripts/tool-contract-semantics.mjs
scripts.docs:check: pnpm --filter @chess-mcp/chess-tools build && node scripts/tool-catalog.mjs --check && node scripts/docs-consistency.mjs
scripts.sync:skills: pnpm --filter @chess-mcp/chess-tools build && node scripts/workflow-guidance.mjs && rm -rf plugin/skills && cp -r .claude/skills plugin/skills
scripts.check:skills: pnpm --filter @chess-mcp/chess-tools build && node scripts/workflow-guidance.mjs --check && diff -r .claude/skills plugin/skills
